org.apache.sling.caconfig.spi
SPI for applications hooking into the configuration infrastructure for parameterizing and customizing.
org.apache.sling.engine.auth
Provides the original authentication handler service API initially bundled with the Sling Engine bundle.

  • Classes in org.apache.sling.api used by org.apache.sling.api

    Description
    SlingException
    The SlingException is the base exception used throughout the Sling API.

  • Classes in org.apache.sling.api used by org.apache.sling.api.request
    Class
    Description
    SlingException
    The SlingException is the base exception used throughout the Sling API.
    SlingHttpServletRequest
    Deprecated.
    Use SlingJakartaHttpServletRequest instead.
    SlingJakartaHttpServletRequest
    The SlingHttpServletRequest defines the interface to provide client request information to a servlet.
  • Classes in org.apache.sling.api used by org.apache.sling.api.request.builder
    Class
    Description
    SlingHttpServletRequest
    Deprecated.
    Use SlingJakartaHttpServletRequest instead.
    SlingHttpServletResponse
    Deprecated.
    Use SlingJakartaHttpServletResponse instead.
    SlingJakartaHttpServletRequest
    The SlingHttpServletRequest defines the interface to provide client request information to a servlet.
    SlingJakartaHttpServletResponse
    The SlingHttpServletResponse defines the interface to assist a servlet in creating and sending a response to the client.
